metadata.title: Far Horizon International Logistics Consulting
metadata.description: Professional international logistics and supply chain consulting services for global business operations

hero.title: Logistics challenges? We help you find answers.
hero.subtitle: Rate queries, solution comparisons, expert matching — your all-in-one logistics advisory platform

about.title: About Far Horizon
about.description: Far Horizon Logistics Consulting is a professional logistics information service platform dedicated to helping import/export enterprises and cross-border e-commerce sellers quickly access accurate logistics information, compare transport solutions, and connect with reliable service providers.
about.mission: Making professional logistics information and solutions accessible to every business
about.vision: Bridging logistics needs with professional services — the go-to logistics advisory platform
about.value_professional_desc: Industry experts providing specialized information and advice
about.value_global_desc: Covering major trade routes and logistics service types worldwide
about.value_innovation_desc: Quick solution comparisons saving research time

why_us.title: Why Choose Us
why_us.description: Professionalism and trust in every delivery
why_us.professional_desc: Core team with 10+ years of international logistics experience, serving 500+ enterprise clients
why_us.global_desc: Professional logistics consulting network covering major trade countries in Asia, Europe and North America
why_us.innovation_desc: Data-driven innovative supply chain optimization solutions based on latest industry analysis
why_us.trust_desc: Completed 1200+ consulting projects with 98% client satisfaction, 60%+ long-term cooperation rate

services.title: Core Services
services.description: We provide professional logistics information and solution recommendations to help you make optimal decisions
services.supply_chain_desc: End-to-end supply chain diagnosis and restructuring, including network optimization, inventory strategy development, and procurement process reengineering to find the optimal balance between cost and efficiency.
services.freight_desc: Ocean, air, rail, and multimodal transport solution design with carrier management, data-driven route planning, and rate negotiation strategies.
services.customs_desc: Import/export customs compliance audits, HS code classification, rules of origin application, and FTA preferential tariff utilization strategies to reduce compliance risk and save duty costs.
services.warehouse_desc: Warehouse site selection and layout optimization, WMS system selection and implementation, last-mile delivery solution design, and cross-border warehousing strategy planning.
services.trade_desc: Export control and sanctions screening, AEO certification guidance, trade compliance management system setup, and cross-border data flow compliance assessment.
services.digital_desc: Logistics IT strategic planning, TMS/WMS system integration, supply chain visibility platform development, and AI-driven forecasting and decision support systems.
services.risk_desc: Supply chain resilience assessment, geopolitical risk analysis, contingency planning and drills, and supplier risk tiering management.
services.sustainability_desc: Carbon emission accounting and reduction roadmap planning, green transportation design, sustainable supply chain certification consulting, and ESG reporting support.

cases.title: Case Studies
cases.description: Case studies based on real platform consulting projects, anonymized for confidentiality
cases.case1_title: Asia-Pacific Supply Chain Restructuring for a Consumer Electronics Company
cases.case1_desc: Consolidated the client's Asia-Pacific warehousing network from 7 locations to 3 regional hubs, improving inventory turnover by 40% and reducing annual logistics costs by 25%.
cases.case2_title: Customs Compliance System for an Automotive Parts Manufacturer
cases.case2_desc: Guided the client through AEO Advanced Certification, reducing customs inspection rate from 8% to 0.5%, shortening clearance time by 60%, and saving approximately $3 million in annual duty costs.
cases.case3_title: Multimodal Transport Optimization for a Cross-border E-commerce Company
cases.case3_desc: Combined China-Europe Railway Express with ocean freight scheduling, reducing average transit time from 35 days to 18 days and cutting per-container transport costs by 22%.

news.title: Industry Insights
news.description: Stay informed with the latest global logistics trends and analysis
news.item1_desc: Container freight rates are expected to remain stable in Q3 2026, though geopolitical tensions and Red Sea disruptions continue to introduce supply chain uncertainty. We help clients develop data-driven rate forecasts and contract strategies.
news.item2_title: Cross-border E-commerce Logistics Regulations Deep Dive
news.item2_desc: New customs regulations for cross-border e-commerce retail exports raise the bar on declaration processes, shipment tracking, and return compliance. Regulatory compliance is becoming a core competitive advantage for globalizing enterprises.
news.item3_title: CBAM Impact Assessment on EU-bound Logistics
news.item3_desc: As the CBAM transition period concludes, exporters to the EU must systematically assess product carbon footprints and optimize transport routes and modal combinations to prepare for the upcoming carbon border tariffs.

privacy.section3_desc: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information. However, no method of data transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy.section6_desc: This policy may be updated periodically.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section2_desc: The information we collect is used solely to respond to your consultation requests and provide the services you request. We do not use your personal information for other purposes or sell it to third parties.
privacy.section5_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact us through the website contact form. We will respond within a reasonable timeframe.
privacy.section1_desc: When you submit a consultation request through this website, we collect the personal information you provide, including your name, email address, phone number, and consultation content. We only collect information you voluntarily provide.
privacy.section4_desc: You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information held by us. To exercise these rights, please contact us through the website contact form.

terms.section3_desc: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, images, graphics, page designs, data compilations, and software code, is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, modify, distribute, or use such content for commercial purposes without written permission.
terms.section6_desc: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access at any time.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section2_desc: The information provided on this platform is compiled from publicly available data and industry experience for reference purposes only. We make reasonable efforts to ensure accuracy but do not guarantee completeness, accuracy, or timeliness.
terms.section7_desc: Governed by Chinese law. Disputes resolved in the competent court of Shanghai.
terms.section5_desc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
terms.section1_desc: This platform provides international logistics information and advisory services, including rate inquiries, transport solution comparisons, and provider recommendations. All information is for reference only and does not constitute any form of contract or legal agreement.
terms.section4_desc: To the maximum extent permitted by law, this platform shall not be liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from the use of information on this website. Users are solely responsible for decisions made based on information from this platform.

guide.step3_desc: View reference rates, transit times and compliance info
guide.step1_desc: Select from rate query, HS code checker, and more
guide.title: How to Use
guide.step2_desc: Fill in origin, destination, cargo info or HS code

faq.a1: Select the tool you need, enter the required information as prompted (origin, destination, cargo details, etc.), and click query to get reference rates, transit times, and compliance requirements. All tools are free to use.
faq.a3: All tools are currently free to use with a daily limit of 5 queries. This allows you to check market conditions. Enterprise and high-frequency users can contact us for dedicated solutions.
faq.a2: Rate data references publicly available market information from the Shanghai Shipping Exchange (SSEFC) and Baltic Exchange. HS code compliance information is compiled based on national customs regulations for reference purposes only.
faq.q1: How do I use these tools?
faq.title: FAQ
